pageDescription: Showcase of reusable UI components built with the portfolio's Feature-Sliced Design architecture.
heading: UI components showcase
buttonsDescription: Navigation actions with consistent hover and focus states.
socialDescription: Compact actions for social and contact destinations.
linksDescription: Links designed for use inside paragraphs and supporting copy.
avatarsDescription: Profile images rendered with the supported component sizes.
badgesDescription: Status and technology labels using the supported visual variants.
containersDescription: Responsive content container with consistent maximum width and centering.
containerBody: This SectionContainer keeps demonstration content aligned with the portfolio layout.
